scripts.start: bun run build:client && bun run src/server.ts
scripts.build: bun run build:client && bun run typecheck
scripts.smoke: bun run build:client && bun run scripts/smoke-test.ts
scripts.migrate: bun -e 'import { runMigrations } from "./src/map/migrations/runner.ts"; import { sql } from "./src/db.ts"; await runMigrations(sql, { onLog: (m) => { process.stdout.write(m + "\n"); } }); await sql.end(); process.exit(0);'
scripts.migrate:status: bun -e 'import { sql } from "./src/db.ts"; const rows = await sql`SELECT id, applied_at FROM schema_migrations ORDER BY id`; for (const r of rows) process.stdout.write(`${r.id}\t${r.applied_at.toISOString()}\n`); await sql.end(); process.exit(0);'
